name: co.twiceapps.sdk
description: Lightweight, dependency-free SDK for the Twice backend: analytics (events, sessions, revenue) + remote config (typed key-value, PlayFab Title-Data style). Drop-in, privacy-safe, works on iOS/Android/WebGL/Windows/macOS/Editor.

samples.description: Init, a preset event, a custom event, Flush, and reading remote config.
Loading-screen demo: a LoadingScreen prefab whose InfoText lists each init step via Twice.OnProgress (Version checked → Analytics → Remote config → Ready).
